description: Classification of pipeline-related scripts by operational importance and maintenance status.

groups.label: Active Core Pipeline
groups.description: Main orchestration path used by current daily/manual pipeline operations.

groups.label: Active Operational Checks
groups.description: Scripts that validate freshness, readiness, discord summaries, and homepage integrity around the pipeline.

groups.label: Active Live Sync
groups.description: SOOP live snapshot generation and serving sync used by the live workflow.

groups.label: Active Maintenance
groups.description: Housekeeping and local maintenance helpers that support pipeline operations without changing serving behavior.

groups.label: Review Candidates
groups.description: Pipeline-adjacent scripts that appear useful but are not part of the main live path and should be reviewed before future cleanup.

groups.label: Debug / Manual Investigation
groups.description: One-off investigation helpers that should not be treated as part of the production pipeline path.
